Author: swills
Date: Mon Sep 10 19:32:09 2012
New Revision: 304059
URL: http://svn.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/304059

Log:

Modified: head/devel/p5-uni-perl/Makefile
==============================================================================

+++ head/devel/p5-uni-perl/Makefile	Mon Sep 10 19:32:09 2012	(r304059)
@@ -6,8 +6,7 @@
 #
 
 PORTNAME=	uni-perl
-PORTVERSION=	0.03
-PORTREVISION=	1
+PORTVERSION=	0.91
 CATEGORIES=	devel perl5
 MASTER_SITES=	CPAN
 MASTER_SITE_SUBDIR=	CPAN:MONS
@@ -23,6 +22,4 @@ TEST_DEPENDS=	p5-Test-NoWarnings>=0:${PO
 
 PERL_CONFIGURE=	5.10.0+
 
-MAN3=	uni::perl.3
-
 .include <bsd.port.mk>
